details.IncidentDetail: "[1] 47-11 IN #3 lane approx. 150 yds west of the "Mace Blvd Chiles Rd" exit sign and directly adjacent to a yellow sign that says "thru traffic merge left" there is a gap in the asphalt 6" wide across the entire lane, then a large pothole 3' long, 1' wide and 6" deep directly after that // CT WILL NEED TO COME OUT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE"
"[51] PGandE IS CLAIMING THIS ISN'T THEIR POLE / MORE THAN LIKELY A COMMUNICATION POLE / POSS ATandT [Shared]"
"[43] CALLER IS CLAIMING THERE IS A PGandE STICKER ON THE POLE [Shared]"
"[41] 45-265 ADV THERE WAS A POLE DMGD IN AREA BUT WAS FROM OLDER CRASH / TRY ATT TO SEE IF POLE BELONGS TO THEM [Shared]"
"[40] 45-265 1022 PGE DUE TO NO POLE DOWN LINE 20 [Shared]"

"[37] [Notification] [CHP]-RES NEAR 9400 BASELINE ADVISE POLE IS LEANING AND A SUPPORT CABLE IS LOW-HANGING IN HIS YARD / ADV HE ATTEMPTED TO CALL PGandE BUT THEY TRIED TO CLAIM THAT THIS WAS NOT THEIR POLE / CONFIRM WE ARE NOT SENDING PGandE OUT TO THIS? POLE# P121357548 [Shared]"
